title: paspalum schesslii
intro: Paspalum schesslii is a species of grass in the genus Paspalum, which is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum schesslii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever. Herbal preparations of Paspalum schesslii are often made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea or by using it as a topical poultice to treat skin conditions.
